mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.product_name as productName, p.price, p.stock, p.description, p.create_time as createTime, p.update_time as updateTime, b.name AS brandName, c.name AS categoryName FROM product p LEFT JOIN brand b ON p.brand_id = b.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id
AND p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
ORDER BY p.update_time DESC
